experience.description: Streamlined library operations by digitizing data and connecting services on a unified platform. Enabled users to search, borrow, and return books easily, while staff managed inventory and members more efficiently. Improved service quality, reduced errors, and scaled with business growth.

Developed an e-commerce platform for selling toys online, expanding business reach and boosting revenue. Managed product browsing, cart management, and secure order placement. Provided a responsive interface optimized for desktop and mobile users, improving customer convenience and supporting store owners with better inventory and order management.
